zh: 项目诞生——一个空的 index.html，没工具、没数据、没后端
en: Project born — one empty index.html, no tools, no data, no backend

zh: WCA 统计数据管道上线，每周自动更新
en: WCA statistics pipeline launched, auto-updated weekly

zh: 第一版首页 + 界面中英双语
en: First homepage; bilingual (English/Chinese) interface

zh: 新增「世界纪录统治力」统计 + XXCross 训练器
en: Added a world-record-dominance stat; XXCross trainer imported

zh: 统计页大幅精简（多页合一）+ 加国旗
en: Stats pages consolidated; country flags added

zh: 「最快新人」榜支持单次 / 平均双榜
en: Fastest-newcomer board gains single/average modes

en: Glassy cards and a Rubik's-particle animation on the homepage

zh: 统计页交互改成下拉和分段控件
en: Stats UI switched to dropdowns and segmented controls

zh: 统计页改成前端实时渲染
en: Stats pages now render live in the browser

zh: 新增三阶多盲平均统计
en: Added a 3×3 multi-blind mean stat

zh: 未来比赛追踪器上线
en: Upcoming-competitions tracker launched

zh: 刷新近期比赛数据
en: Refresh upcoming-competition data

en: Recon gains a single-result column and infinite scroll

en: Recon gains cancelled badges, admin editing, and a submit page

zh: 复盘数据搬进数据库 + 选手自动补全
en: Recon data moved into a database; cuber autocomplete

en: Recon list-view polish

zh: 选手搜索改本地优先，更快
en: Cuber search goes local-first and faster

zh: 分布页加累积直方图、卡片提示框

en: Recon Reactified; stats pipeline rewritten in TypeScript

en: Nemesis lookup completed; WCA person pages; world unofficial rankings

en: Algorithm reference launched; recon auto-detects stages

en: On-this-day popup; patterns library supports bigger cubes

en: Refresh upcoming-competition data and Chinese names

en: Scramble generator re-engined; PDF export; homepage regrouped

en: Commutator decomposition tool launched

en: Refresh upcoming-competition data and Chinese names

en: Nine more languages in the coding hub; triple-entry hot-reload

en: Continent icons inlined; URL language normalization

zh: 虚拟魔方、比赛实时直播、深浅色主题同天上线
en: Virtual cube, live competition results, and light/dark themes — same day

zh: 比赛页接入官方实时直播 + 赛前心理表
en: Live official results and a psych sheet on the competition page

zh: 全站搜索上线（11 大类别）
en: Site-wide search launched (11 categories)

zh: 三阶深度预测长文 + 百科上线
en: Deep 3×3 prediction essay and an encyclopedia launched

zh: 虚拟魔方扩展到所有 WCA 项目
en: Virtual cube expands to every WCA event

zh: /sim 斜方与 SQ1 拖拽转动 + 打乱生成器支持非 WCA 项目与后台预生成
en: /sim drag-to-turn for Skewb and Square-1 + scramble generator adds non-WCA events with background pre-generation

zh: 比赛中文名兜底缓存进数据库 + 生日 PR 新统计 + 镜面魔方打乱图与共享 NxN 仿真支持到 300 阶
en: Chinese competition names cached through the database + birthday-PB stat + mirror-puzzle scramble images and a shared NxN sim up to order 300

zh: 手机 App 脚手架搭起（iOS / Android 套壳）
en: Mobile app scaffold (iOS / Android shells)

zh: 全站统一搜索（比赛 / 选手 / 复盘 / 公式集，分块加载）+ 比赛个人纪录服务端计算 + 复盘与选手双向跳转
en: Unified site-wide search (comps / persons / recon / alg sets, chunked loading) + server-side personal records for comps + bidirectional recon-person linking

zh: 首页进行中比赛条与智能粘贴、语音输入 + 比赛弹窗复制按钮
en: Landing ongoing-comps strip with smart paste and voice input + competition copy buttons

zh: 手机 App 加 WCA 登录跳转 + 自动测试
en: Mobile app gains WCA login deep-link and automated tests

zh: 已结束比赛走静态快照快速通道 + 多盲 / 最少步成绩格式修正 + 部署与初始化脚本跨平台修正
en: Static-snapshot fast path for finished competitions + Multi-Blind / Fewest-Moves formatting fixes + cross-platform deploy and seed scripts

zh: Phase 4 整体迁移：全部页面从单页应用移植到 Next.js 16（App Router）+ Vercel 与自有服务器双部署配置
en: Phase 4 migration: all pages ported from the SPA to Next.js 16 (App Router) + dual Vercel / self-hosted deploy config

zh: 主域切到 Next.js（Phase 4）
en: Main domain switched to Next.js (Phase 4)

zh: 全站桌宠 + 网页版交叉步求解器上线
en: Site-wide desk pet and a browser cross-step solver launched

zh: 分析器输出变体解法（Rust WASM）+ F2LEO 与伪 F2LEO 上线比赛十字分析 + 打乱按比赛统计十字步数与每周管道
en: Analyzer emits variant solutions (Rust WASM) + F2LEO and Pseudo-F2LEO live in competition cross analysis + per-competition cross-step distribution with a weekly pipeline

zh: 首页纪录快讯纳入 cubing.com 推断的中国纪录 + 比赛内纪录渐进标注
en: Homepage record feed includes inferred China records from cubing.com + progressive within-competition record tagging

zh: 求解引擎并入主仓库 + 求解器进度看板
en: Solver engine vendored in; solver progress dashboard

zh: 计时器大改版：单人和对战合一 + 实时排名
en: Timer redesign: Solo and Battle unified; live ranks

zh: 历史名人堂年度普查（Sum of Ranks）+ 比赛日历可读化与跨夜比赛 + 桌宠 PLL 表演
en: Historical hall-of-fame census (Sum of Ranks) + readable competition calendar with overnight comps + deskpet PLL performer

zh: 首页「今日神打」每日最易打乱展示 + 训练器项目进 URL + 选手页旗帜与领奖台名次细节
en: Landing Daily-God easiest-scramble-of-the-day showcase + trainer event in the URL + person-page flag and podium polish

zh: Python 彻底退出项目
en: Python fully retired from the project

zh: 首页今日复盘大字卡片与近期打乱双栏默认
en: Landing today-recon big-time card and recent-scrambles dual default

zh: 社区投稿系统 + 23 个趣味榜单 + 多人复盘
en: Community publishing; 23 fun leaderboards; multi-cuber recon

zh: 比赛结果弹窗点击复制赛名与个人纪录的国家 / 世界排名 + 监控推送链接改指向站内比赛页
en: Result modal copies competition name and shows national / world rank for PRs + monitor push links point to the in-site competition page

zh: 英文网址去前缀 + 繁体中文全覆盖 + 桥式训练器上线 + 日历地球合并
en: Bare English URLs, full Traditional Chinese, Roux trainer, calendar/globe merged

zh: 名次和加深度工具 + 计时器接入真实 WCA 打乱
en: Sum-of-Ranks deep tools; real WCA scrambles in the timer

zh: 求解器扩充（Roux FB / Petrus 2x2x3 / EOLine / DR / F2B）+ 计时器公开打乱打卡与精度设置 + 打乱按项目分难度 + /code 新增设计令牌与 hooks/utils 索引
en: Solver fleet grows (Roux FB / Petrus 2x2x3 / EOLine / DR / F2B) + public timer scramble-marks with precision settings + per-event scramble difficulty + /code design-token and hooks/utils reference pages

zh: HTR 求解器完成，主流解法每个阶段都能分析
en: HTR solver complete — every major method step can be analysed

zh: 赞助墙 /support 上线（捐赠 + 后台管理）+ 首页报名卡显示各项目轮次
en: Sponsor wall /support launches (donation + admin); announced-comp cards show per-event rounds

zh: 关注选手的成绩变更监控 + 选手页变更面板 + 比赛页打乱移到独立标签
en: Result-change monitor for watched cubers + person-page panel; comp scrambles move to a tab

zh: 移除繁体中文（只留简体 + 英文）+ 退役 Vite / Capacitor 旧前端 + 桌宠加反馈入口
en: Traditional Chinese removed (Simplified + English only); Vite / Capacitor frontend retired; feedback entry on the desk pet

zh: 矢量绘图编辑器 /paint 上线 + 打乱页加云端最优求解 + 成绩变更内联编辑
en: Vector drawing editor /paint launches; cloud optimal solve on the scramble page; inline result-change editor

zh: SQ1 整解最优求解器起步 + 公式库恢复社区投稿与 3D 播放 + 难度筛选 WCA 打乱
en: SQ1 WCA-optimal solver begins; community alg submissions restored with 3D playback; difficulty-filtered WCA scrambles

zh: SQ1 精确难度注入管道（步数 + 最优解）+ 比赛详情与选手成绩视图改进
en: SQ1 exact difficulty injection pipeline (counts + optimal solutions); comp-detail and person-result views improved

zh: SQ1 全部 278 个难解打乱算出最优 + 难度页改用精确最优 + 会员到期提醒
en: SQ1 — all 278 hardest scrambles solved optimally; difficulty page switches to exact optimal; membership expiry reminder

zh: WCA 比赛城市名全站中文化 + 选手主页加纪录 / 领奖台 / 杂项标签 + SQ1 slash 计步最优
en: WCA competition cities localized to Chinese site-wide; person pages gain records / podium / misc tabs; SQ1 slash-metric optimal

zh: 非 WCA 异形魔方求解器批量起步（地板 / 二三阶塔 / 八数码 / UFO / 魔表 / 钻石 / 齿轮 / 15 数码）
en: Non-WCA puzzle solver fleet begins (Floppy / 2x2x3 / 8-puzzle / UFO / Cmetrick / Diamond / Gear / 15-puzzle)

zh: 立方体魔方 233 / 334 / 335 / 336 / 337 求解器 + 打乱求解与分布合并到一页 + 裸域名定为规范域
en: Cuboid solvers 233 / 334 / 335 / 336 / 337; solve + distribution merged onto one page; bare domain set canonical

zh: WCA 统计入口拆成四张卡 + 新增 4 个 /code 开发页 + 纯 TS 三阶 STM 整解 + 更多异形求解器
en: WCA hub split into four cards; four new /code dev pages; pure-TS 3x3 STM optimal solver; more non-WCA solvers

zh: 阶段求解器加步法限制与色中性筛选 + /sim 加 Redi / Dino 魔方 + 排名加性别筛选
en: Stage solver gains move restriction + color-neutral filter; /sim adds Redi / Dino cubes; rankings gain gender filter

zh: /sim 引入群论内核渲染引擎 + 自有引擎金字塔 / 五魔方 / 斜转 + 规则页加更新动态
en: /sim gains a group-theory rendering kernel + in-house Pyraminx / Megaminx / Skewb; regulation 'What's New' hub

zh: /sim 加 FTO（面转八面体）引擎 + 打乱统计改 sha1 增量发布 + 计时器冒号改点
en: /sim adds an FTO engine; scramble stats switch to sha1 incremental publishing; timer colon-as-dots

zh: /sim 加原色裸核 + 超阶切面 + 复盘 Tab 一键补全最优十字 + SQ1 复形分布
en: /sim adds a stickerless raw core + super-order cross-section; recon Tab autofills optimal cross; SQ1 cubeshape distribution

zh: /sim 加镜面魔方 + Puzzle Cuts 编辑器 + 接入 knip 死代码检测清理 19 文件 + 排名默认选手视图
en: /sim adds a Mirror Cube + Puzzle Cuts editor; knip dead-code detection removes 19 files; /wca/results defaults to persons view

zh: 复盘自动补全支持任意底色十字 + 同选手同打乱需填理由才可重复 + 成绩格点链到复盘
en: Recon autofill works for any cross colour; duplicate player+scramble requires a reason; comp result cells link to reconstructions

zh: 规则页加官方全文逐字镜像 /regulation/full + 全站统一成绩弹窗 + /sim 设置面板用开关
en: Regulation full-text verbatim mirror /regulation/full; unified solve popup site-wide; /sim settings use toggles

zh: 新建 /code/guards 约束守卫索引页 + 全站复选框统一为开关 + 多盲成绩按数值解码
en: New /code/guards constraint-guard index page; checkboxes unified to toggles site-wide; MBLD decoded by value magnitude

zh: 新建 /math/kernel 群论内核讲解页 + /sim 各魔方接入群论内核 + 打乱分布加单次与分组平均切换 + 比赛详情页加相似比赛标签
en: New /math/kernel group-theory explainer; /sim puzzles wired to the group-theory kernel; scramble distribution toggles single vs group-average; competition detail gains a similar-comps tab

zh: 修复直播比赛缓存无界导致的每日 OOM + 分组平均柱可点开看示例比赛组 + 桌宠 Clawd 用爪子转动魔方
en: Bounded the live-competition cache to stop daily OOM crashes; group-average bars open to example competition groups; desk-pet Clawd turns the cube with its own claws

zh: 上线内部账号:邮箱与手机验证码登录、一号绑定多身份 + /sim 加 3x3 指法手模(设置开关)
en: Internal accounts land — email and phone-code login with multiple identities per account; /sim gains a fingertrick hand model for 3x3 (settings toggle)

zh: /sim 手模换成 GLTF 蒙皮骨骼模型 + 登录加 Google 与 Apple 风格分段验证码框 + 复盘比赛属性改为 WCA / 非 WCA / 练习三态
en: /sim hands rebuilt as a rigged GLTF skinned mesh; login adds Google and an Apple-style segmented code input; recon's official flag becomes a WCA / non-WCA / practice enum

zh: 导入速拧视频自动复盘引擎为仓库顶层 + 登录加微信 / QQ / 支付宝绑定 + WCA 统计加单轮前三名之和 + 一级内容页统一返回首页 + 计时器网格对局配对选手共享打乱
en: The solve-video reconstruction engine is imported as a repo top-level; login gains WeChat / QQ / Alipay binding; WCA stats add a Round Top-3 Sum; first-level content pages get a consistent back-home link; grid battle shares one scramble between paired players

zh: 复盘提交表单按选手带出资料链接与比赛 / 方法 / 魔方历史 + /sim 加 3x3 最优打乱按钮 + F2L 消去延伸到十字族 + 近期比赛抓取失败据实报因
en: Recon submit form surfaces per-person profile links and comp / method / cube history; /sim gains an optimal-scramble button; F2L cancel-into extends to the cross family; upcoming-comps reports the actual fetch-failure reason

zh: 刷新近期比赛数据、中文赛名与 WCA 统计
en: Refreshed upcoming competitions, Chinese comp names, and WCA statistics

zh: 上线 /forum 社区论坛并将 /article 长文并入 + /sim 手模三轮避让重做 + 引擎斜转改用 WCA 记号 + 教程页自定义 Speffz 字母方案 + 打乱难度加各阶段国家构成柱
en: The /forum community forum launches and /article long-form posts fold into it; /sim hands reworked over three rounds; the Skewb engine switches to WCA notation; the tutorial gains a custom Speffz letter scheme; scramble difficulty adds a per-step country breakdown bar

zh: 复盘同赛表格加单轮步数与 TPS 的 Ao5 及整解复制 + /sim 手模第四五轮指法 + 斜转记号指南可点字母演示 + 论坛回复用富文本编辑器 + 打乱难度国家改为可搜索下拉
en: Recon's same-comp table gains a round-level moves/TPS Ao5 and a full-reconstruction copy; /sim hands rounds 4-5; a Skewb notation guide demos each letter on tap; forum replies use the rich editor; the scramble country filter becomes a searchable dropdown

zh: 刷新近期比赛数据、中文赛名与 WCA 统计
en: Refresh upcoming-competition data, Chinese comp names and WCA statistics

zh: /sim 手模多轮精修（对称、前臂融合）+ 邮箱密码登录与登录弹窗重做 + 计时器按步数打乱与自建二阶 / 金字塔状态枚举 + 复盘视频解码算法研究
en: /sim hand-rig refinement (symmetry, fused forearm) + email/password login and login-modal redesign + timer move-count scrambles with home-grown 2x2/pyraminx state enumeration + recon-decode research

zh: 图像编辑器并入 /sim 图像面板 + 1LLL 公式表迁入公式库 + 密码重置上线 + 打乱库加二阶首面与金字塔 V 形图样画廊
en: Visual cube image editor merges into /sim's image panel + 1LLL algorithm sheet migrated into the algorithm DB + password-reset flow launches + scramble library gains a 2x2 first-face and Pyraminx V-shape case gallery

zh: 站内通知系统上线（复盘评论 / 回复提醒，可关邮件）+ 公式库标记失效算法并上报管理员 + 打乱图样库加指标下拉，EOLine 并入 EO 方法
en: Site-wide notification system launches (recon comment/reply alerts, opt-out emails) + algorithm DB flags failing algs and reports them to admins + scramble case gallery gains a metric dropdown; EOLine folds into the EO method

zh: 通知系统接入论坛并按收件人本地化邮件 + 训练器完全迁入 /alg（退役 /trainer）+ 页面公告栏（管理可编辑）上线 + 公式库管理加拖拽排序与失效追踪
en: Notifications wire up forum triggers with per-recipient email localization + the trainer fully migrates into /alg (retiring /trainer) + admin-editable page notice bars launch + algorithm-DB admin gains drag-reorder and failing-alg tracking

zh: /sim 加阶段染色遮罩与齿轮魔方模拟器 + /icon 图标画廊上线 + 计时器数字字体可选 + /math/probability 概率页上线
en: /sim gains stage-stickering masks and a Gear Cube simulator + /icon icon gallery launches + timer gains selectable big-digit fonts + /math/probability page launches
